wins_analysis: No wins today as zero trades were placed. The system generated no recommendations, likely because the AI module was unavailable and the zone score fallback failed to identify any qualifying setups.
losses_analysis: No losses today, but the real failure is opportunity cost — Nifty rallied +3.7% in a strong uptrend with ADX=25 and low VIX=13.4, meaning many stocks likely had excellent long setups that were completely missed.
regime_impact: Today's trending_up regime with strong momentum (+3.7%) and low volatility (VIX 13.4) was ideal for demand zone breakout and pullback strategies. The system entirely failed to capitalize on what should have been a high-probability day for long trades.

improvements.action: Fix AI module availability or implement a robust fallback scan that generates recommendations when AI is offline — use zone score threshold of 65+ combined with RSI>50 and price above 20EMA to generate BUY candidates
improvements.reason: Zero trades on a +3.7% trending day is unacceptable; the fallback system produced nothing despite ideal conditions

improvements.action: Add a regime-aware forced scan: when regime=trending_up and ADX>=22 and VIX<16, automatically scan top 15 Nifty stocks by relative strength for demand zone proximity (within 1.5% of zone) and place at least 3-5 pending orders
improvements.reason: Strong trend days with low VIX are highest-probability environments; system must have trades on such days

improvements.action: Implement a momentum breakout strategy as secondary signal: identify stocks breaking above previous day's high with volume confirmation, use 0.8% stop loss and 1.6% target on trending days
improvements.reason: On a +3.7% Nifty day, breakout plays on leaders like RELIANCE, HDFCBANK, INFY likely triggered and would have provided 1.5-2% gains

improvements.action: Pre-compute tomorrow's demand zones tonight for top 10 relative strength leaders from today's session; set pending BUY orders at zone + 0.2% buffer before market open
improvements.reason: Trend continuation after a +3.7% day often sees pullbacks to intraday demand zones in the first 30 minutes — orders must be ready

improvements.action: Prioritize symbol selection toward high-beta Nifty stocks (TATAMOTORS, BAJFINANCE, ADANIENT, SBIN) on trend continuation days, as they amplify index moves by 1.3-1.8x
improvements.reason: These stocks likely moved 4-6% today and would have offered the best risk-reward on long setups

tomorrow_focus: With Nifty up 3.7% today, watch for trend continuation with a morning pullback to VWAP or demand zones on leaders — be ready with pre-placed BUY orders and ensure the scan system is operational.

symbol_notes.TATAMOTORS.NS: High-beta stock likely surged 4-6% today — watch for pullback to today's breakout level as demand zone for BUY
symbol_notes.BAJFINANCE.NS: Financial sector likely led the rally — look for continuation above today's high with tight stop
symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Heavyweight likely contributed to Nifty surge — monitor for demand zone entry near today's VWAP
symbol_notes.SBIN.NS: Banking bellwether in strong trends — favour BUY on any dip to 20EMA or intraday support
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Core Nifty mover — if it held above previous resistance turned support, BUY setup remains valid
